title: SQL: select ... where extract( ...) = ... and extract( ...
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIME, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, event_time, description) VALUES (1, TIME '12:34:56', 'Event A');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, event_time, description) VALUES (2, TIME '12:34:00', 'Event B');
SELECT event_time FROM test_table WHERE CAST(event_time AS TIMESTAMP) BETWEEN TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01 12:34:00' AND TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01 12:34:59';
SELECT event_time FROM test_table WHERE event_time IS NULL;
key_bug_features: extract function with multiple conditions on time column
